For those hard to get to clients add this phrase to any of the above strategies. Simply say or put in an email or mail handwritten would be perfect. Obviously John you can see how hard I'm working to get your business and you're right and I'm going to continue to do so. Just think about how hard I'll work to keep your business. Look people should judge people based on what they do not based on what they say. You can see I'm working hard. I know you can see it even though you're not calling me back. I know you can see it and you're right and I'm going to continue to do this. Just think about how hard I'll work to keep your business. Add that to any of these strategies. Throw in a chocolate foot, hit them with a telegram, send them a photo, send them some chocolate M&Ms with their name on it. Look sooner or later the stream wears out the rock.
